description_long: This object is a vintage-style postbox, predominantly painted green with ornate white detailing on the upper front panel. The structure is tall and rectangular, with a slightly arched top and a sturdy black base for stability. The front face features a prominent rectangular door with a handle, above which is a collection times panel with text and decorative motifs. The mail slot is integrated into the upper section of the door, designed for easy posting of letters. The sides are plain and flat, while the rear is unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall construction appears robust, likely made of metal, and is intended for public use in urban environments.
description: A tall, green vintage postbox with ornate white detailing, a front mail slot, and a black base. Features a collection times panel and a sturdy, metallic build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile, green body, and black base, with no visible openings or panels.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain green back and black base, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the narrow green body and black base.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the ornate white detailing, collection times panel, mail slot, and access door with handle.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the upper front face, integrated into the door below the arched top
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel on the upper front face above the mail slot, featuring text and decorative motifs
attribute_postal_service_logo: no visible postal service logo or insignia present
attribute_door_or_access_panel: rectangular access door on the front face below the mail slot, equipped with a handle
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with beveled edges
